跟导师计划买彩票【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-238137110_63253048<br>vk.com/topic-235289920_63253051<br>vk.com/topic-238147933_62378354<br>vk.com/topic-237847582_62739343<br>vk.com/topic-238672923_62378372<br>vk.com/topic-238756392_62739360<br>vk.com/topic-235289929_62934325<br>vk.com/topic-238626004_62129034<br>vk.com/topic-238620096_62488015<br>vk.com/topic-238626002_62739406<br>vk.com/topic-238626000_63253131<br>vk.com/topic-235289920_63253176<br>vk.com/topic-237847582_62739484<br>vk.com/topic-238756392_62739503<br>vk.com/topic-238626004_62129164<br>vk.com/topic-238756387_63581197<br>vk.com/topic-238620096_62488140<br>vk.com/topic-238620159_62934535<br>vk.com/topic-238137110_63253277<br>vk.com/topic-238672923_62378674<br>vk.com/topic-237847582_62739627<br>vk.com/topic-238626004_62129275<br>vk.com/topic-235289929_62934616<br>vk.com/topic-238620096_62488275<br>vk.com/topic-238626002_62739695<br>vk.com/topic-238626000_63253374<br>vk.com/topic-238672923_62378815<br>vk.com/topic-238626003_62378837<br>vk.com/topic-235289920_63253434<br>vk.com/topic-237847582_62739770<br>vk.com/topic-238756387_63581429<br>vk.com/topic-235289928_62624933<br>vk.com/topic-238620159_62934791<br>vk.com/topi
